body:
## Summary
- Adds `--focus-weekly-recap-runtime` to `scripts/validate-content.js`.
- Validates the weekly recap malformed-runtime-input guard in 7 deterministic cases and emits `weeklyRecapRuntimeCasesValidated` plus `weeklyRecapRuntimeParityValidated`.
- Keeps the weekly recap guard on the full `validate:content` path and adds routing coverage.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-weekly-recap-runtime`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js --test-name-pattern "weekly recap"`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern "weekly recap" scripts/learning.test.js tests/v1-1-pro-foundations.test.js`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content`
- `git diff --check`
title: [codex] add weekly recap focused validator
